declared_unit: a single piece of transformer (including packaging) operating for 35 years
note: This EPD does not use the standard EN 15804 modular structure (A1-A3, etc.). Results are reported only in 'Upstream', 'Core', and 'Downstream' columns plus a TOTAL. There is no A1-A3 production-stage figure. For reference, the TOTAL (cradle-to-grave) GWP values are: GWP-fossil 3.58E+04, GWP-biogenic 9.18E+01, GWP-total 3.68E+04, GWP-GHG 3.69E+04 kg CO2 eq. per declared unit; the Upstream+Core (closest analogue to production stage) would be roughly fossil ~3.68E+03, total ~3.60E+03, but these are not defined as A1-A3, so all A1-A3 fields are left null.
